tool.description: Get the Moon phase information (returns text/ASCII art).

args.description: Optional arguments to append (e.g. '@2016-10-25' for date, or ',London' for location).

tool.name: wttrin_b658db5c.get_moon_phase

tool.description:
Get the weather forecast for a location in JSON format.
By default uses 'en' language.

location.description:
The location to query. Can be:
- City name (e.g. "Paris")
- Airport code (e.g. "muc")
- Area code (e.g. "94107")
- GPS coordinates (e.g. "-78.46,106.79")
- Special locations: "~Eiffel+tower"

tool.name: wttrin_b658db5c.get_weather
